title: PALONE Bug Zapper 4500V Mosquito Killer Lamp 20W Insect Fly Zapper Traps with UV Light Catcher 100m² Coverage for Indoor Garden Outdoor, Effective Fly Killer for Mosquitoes, Flies, Wasps, Moths
bullet_points: 4500V Bug Zapper: Electric fly zapper adopts 20W UV 360° physical exterminator, which can release 365NM UV light waves to effectively attract mosquitoes, flies, wasps, moths and kill them quickly with 4500V high voltage. Mosquitoes falling into the tray will not affect the beauty of the table.

Safe & Non-Toxic: Fly catcher adopts physical mosquito extinguishing method, no noise, no chemicals, can 100% physically eliminate mosquitoes, friendly to pregnant women, children and pets. The shell of the mosquito killer is made of high quality ABS material to prevent accidental contact, which can safely and effectively eliminate fruit flies, flying insects, etc.

Easy to Use: Plug the fly killer lamp into the power supply, the light comes on and starts working. There is a hook on the top of the light, you can put it on the table or hang it up to use. There is a removable tray at the bottom of the mosquito killer to collect insect debris, just twist and remove the tray for cleaning, very convenient!

Wide Application: The insect killer has 360 degree coverage, safe and effective, ideal for homes, offices, kitchens, restaurants, schools, hospitals and other places. To enhance the effect, it is recommended to place the fly catcher at a height of 20cm to 100cm to ensure that the UV rays cover the entire space in the room.

Premium Service: It is recommended to place the fly zapper electric on the bedside table 2-3 hours before bedtime and close doors, windows and lights so that the mosquito killer is the only source of light in the darkness. If you have other questions, please contact us so that we can provide you with satisfactory help and service.
